_comment: The Champion (gym 24) is part of the Elite Four gauntlet, enforced at runtime by cobblemon-bridge's E4GauntletHook: the player must beat E4 #1-4 (gyms 20-23) and then the Champion consecutively in one run (dimension leash + party stability). Losing to the Champion resets the whole gauntlet back to E4 #1.

description.text: Defeat the Champion to conquer the Elite Four gauntlet and claim the title. Lose to the Champion and you restart from Elite Four #1.
